title: ScheduleEngine
description:
Implement the ScheduleEngine from docs/design-triggers-schedules.md.

Sections: ScheduleEngine

Key deliverables:
- ScheduleEngine struct with Run/Add/Remove/List methods
- RRULE evaluation with RFC 3339 start time (find/select an RRULE library for Go)
- Timer management per active schedule
- Three condition modes: RunIf, StopWhen, RunOnceWhen
- RunIf: skip on condition fail, run on pass, schedule continues
- StopWhen: run until condition passes, then delete schedule
- RunOnceWhen: skip until condition passes, fire once, consume on attempt
- Recurring schedule failure semantics: continue on action failure
- Unit tests: fires on time, all three condition modes, recurring RRULE,
  finite RRULE (COUNT), remove before fire

References:
- Plan: docs/design-triggers-schedules.md §ScheduleEngine
- Depends on: h2-ifg.1 (automation foundation types + ActionRunner)
